questions.q: In Advantage+ Audience, the custom audiences and detailed targeting you add work as:
options: A hard limit that cannot be exceeded
Suggestions that prioritize, not rigid limits
questions.explanation: They are signals/suggestions; the system can go beyond them if it finds conversions.

questions.q: Valid sources for a custom audience. Select 3.
questions.explanation: Website, app, and customer list (plus engagement) are sources for a custom audience.

questions.q: Maximum precision for people similar to your best customers:
options: Lookalike 1% over a seed of high-value customers
questions.explanation: 1% = closest match; a high-value seed = better lookalike quality.

questions.q: Re-engaging people who added to cart and didn't buy within 7 days:
options: Website custom audience by AddToCart, excluding Purchase
questions.explanation: Web-behavior remarketing with an exclusion of those who already purchased.

options: Almost no delivery and high CPM
questions.explanation: An audience that's too small = the system can't optimize; cost goes up and delivery drops.

questions.q: A regulated client that may NOT go outside an audience defined by law:
questions.explanation: A hard legal restriction = strict control (original audience).

questions.q: What is the purpose of excluding custom audiences in prospecting?
options: To avoid paying twice for existing customers/converters
questions.explanation: Excluding customers avoids cannibalizing and wasting budget re-engaging those who already converted.

options: A large seed of random visitors
questions.explanation: Seed quality rules; better seed = better lookalike.

questions.q: Scaling acquisition without cannibalizing existing customers:
options: Advantage+/high-value lookalike for prospecting, excluding customers; remarketing separately
questions.explanation: Prospecting with a customer exclusion + a separate remarketing effort scales without cannibalizing.

questions.q: When is Advantage+ Audience a good fit? Select 2.
options: Maximizing results with conversion signal available
Broad prospecting where letting the system expand helps
When there is a hard legal limit on the audience
When a strictly brand-bounded audience is required
questions.explanation: Advantage+ shines at maximization/prospecting; cases with a hard limit call for the original audience.
